libsource.description: Resettable fuse, polymeric positive temperature coefficient, small symbol

property.name: ki_description
property.value: Resettable fuse, polymeric positive temperature coefficient, small symbol

property.name: ki_keywords
property.value: resettable fuse PTC PPTC polyfuse polyswitch

fields.field: SK6812MINI-E is a smart LED control circuit and light emitting circuit in one controlled LED source, which has the shape of a 3528 LED chip.
